testsuite.name: tests.hw.HwParsingFiles

testcase.name: parsingCsvFromZip()
testcase.failure: java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException: Index: 0, Size: 0 at java.base/java.util.LinkedList.checkElementIndex(LinkedList.java:566) at java.base/java.util.LinkedList.get(LinkedList.java:487) at tests.hw.HwParsingFiles.parsingCsvFromZip(HwParsingFiles.java:60) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)

testcase.name: parsingPdfFromZip()
testcase.failure: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Invalid PDF file: at com.codeborne.pdftest.PDF.<init>(PDF.java:76) at com.codeborne.pdftest.PDF.<init>(PDF.java:47) at com.codeborne.pdftest.PDF.<init>(PDF.java:93) at com.codeborne.pdftest.PDF.<init>(PDF.java:97) at tests.hw.HwParsingFiles.parsingPdfFromZip(HwParsingFiles.java:38) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) Caused by: java.io.IOException: Error: End-of-File, expected line at offset 0 at org.apache.pdfbox.pdfparser.BaseParser.readLine(BaseParser.java:1134) at org.apache.pdfbox.pdfparser.COSParser.parseHeader(COSParser.java:1620) at org.apache.pdfbox.pdfparser.COSParser.parsePDFHeader(COSParser.java:1603) at org.apache.pdfbox.pdfparser.PDFParser.parse(PDFParser.java:157) at org.apache.pdfbox.pdfparser.PDFParser.parse(PDFParser.java:136) at com.codeborne.pdftest.PDF.<init>(PDF.java:54) ... 7 more

testsuite.system-out: ENTRY: [Price-Crimea-Electric-2025.pdf] LENGTH: 328533 BYTES: 80 114 105 99 101 45 67 114 105 109 101 97 45 69 108 101 99 116 114 105 99 45 50 48 50 53 46 112 100 102 ENTRY: [testXlsx.xlsx] LENGTH: 8492 BYTES: 116 101 115 116 88 108 115 120 46 120 108 115 120 ENTRY: [username.csv] LENGTH: 180 BYTES: 117 115 101 114 110 97 109 101 46 99 115 118 Тут отображается название файла: [B@1ae8bcbc ENTRY: [Price-Crimea-Electric-2025.pdf] LENGTH: 328533 BYTES: 80 114 105 99 101 45 67 114 105 109 101 97 45 69 108 101 99 116 114 105 99 45 50 48 50 53 46 112 100 102 ENTRY: [testXlsx.xlsx] LENGTH: 8492 BYTES: 116 101 115 116 88 108 115 120 46 120 108 115 120 ENTRY: [username.csv] LENGTH: 180 BYTES: 117 115 101 114 110 97 109 101 46 99 115 118 Тут отображается название файла: [B@6f19ac19 2026-03-27T04:02:35.678874900Z Test worker ERROR Log4j API could not find a logging provider.
